description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push. The workflow has two jobs: one for macOS and one for Linux. The macOS job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.7, installs packages and Python modules, downloads dependencies, and compiles the code. The Linux job uses a matrix strategy to run on multiple targets, checks out the code, installs dependencies, compiles the code, runs tests, and publishes coverage to Codecov.
